title: StareeeCoin
description: Introduces several tiers of coinage, which can be crafted between each other, but which can only be obtained via creative mode or commands.
body:
# StareeeCoin, A Simple Coinage Mod

This mod introduces several tiers of uncraftable coins, for issuance by server operators.

Use `/give <player> stareeecoin:coin_coal` to give someone one of the lowest tier of coin, like usual.
But the real use for this mod is in conjunction with other tools, like command blocks, or certain mods which introduce trading posts, to build things like admin shops.

There are, at time of this writing, 5 different tiers of StareeeCoin:
- Coal
- Copper
- Gold
- Diamond
- Emerald

Each is worth 8 times as much as the one before, and allows you to issue quite obnoxious amounts of in-world currency, without forcing inventories to become too cluttered.

There is a shapeless crafting recipe to combine 8 coins of a lower tier to the next one up, and to divide 1 coin of a higher tier into 8 coins of the next one down.
